nodes.name: CODE - Expand CVs and duplicate flag

parameters.jsCode:
const j = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...j, cv_plaintext: String(j.cv_text || '').replace(/\r/g, '').trim() } }];

parameters.subject: =Your application — next step: technical assessment (Phase {{ $json.session_phase }}/{{ $json.config.max_questions }})
parameters.message:
={{ (() => { const score = $json.score ?? 0; const maxQ = $json.config?.max_questions ?? 5; const org = $json.config?.organization_name || 'Talent Acquisition Team'; const role = $json.config?.requisition_title || 'Open role'; const email = String($json.candidate_email || '').trim().split('\n')[0].split(/\s+regards/i)[0].trim(); const session = $json.session_db_id || $json.id || ''; const link = 'https://talent-acquisition-six.vercel.app/?session=' + encodeURIComponent(session) + '&email=' + encodeURIComponent(email); return `

Talent Assessment

You are shortlisted

Hello,

Your CV has been successfully screened for ${role} with a score of ${score}/100.

To proceed, complete our interactive technical assessment. It has ${maxQ} timed phases. Each phase includes one question linked to your CV and the job description.

Start your assessment

If the button does not work, copy this link into your browser:

${link}

Regards,
${org}

Please use a desktop browser, allow fullscreen, and keep the assessment tab focused.

`; })() }}

nodes.name: CODE - SB URLs after outreach mail

parameters.url: ={{ $('CFG - Workflow configuration').first().json.config.supabase_url.replace(/\/$/, '') + '/rest/v1/assessment_sessions?id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(String($('CODE - SB map session id').first().json.session_db_id || $('CODE - SB map session id').first().json.id || '')) }}
